title: Warp Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by price manipulation on Uniswap LP tokens to borrow more than collateralized amount

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls flashLoan() followed by minting LP tokens on Uniswap and depositing them as collateral within the same transaction.
prevention.trigger: FLASHLOAN -> mint LP tokens -> deposit LP tokens as collateral in single tx

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls flashLoan() followed by minting LP tokens on Uniswap and depositing them as collateral within the same transaction.
summary: Warp Finance was hacked through a flash loan followed by price manipulation on Uniswap LP tokens, allowing the attacker to borrow more than their collateralized amount. A guard could have detected and blocked this by monitoring for flash loans followed by LP token minting and collateral deposit in the same transaction.
